# Shard Crossing

## Theme

A broken crossroads filled with shard energy, lost pilgrims and ancient road guardians.

Reality feels unstable here.

## Biome Gameplay

Shard Crossing teaches:

- avoiding delayed magic zones
- fighting mixed melee and magic enemies
- target priority
- reacting to teleport / displacement mechanics

Rule:
Enemies here manipulate space, paths and shard energy.

---

# Crossroad Guard

## Role
Defensive Melee

## Difficulty
Easy / Medium

## Description
Old road guardian still protecting the crossing.

## AI
- Walks toward the player.
- Tries to stay between the player and weaker enemies.
- Uses heavy melee attacks.

## Basic Attack
Guard Strike

## Ability
Shield Bash

Short forward bash.

Effects:
- medium damage
- small knockback

## Required Animations
- Idle
- Walk
- Run
- Attack
- Shield Bash / Heavy Attack
- Death

---

# Shardling

## Role
Fast Skirmisher

## Difficulty
Easy

## Description
Small creature born from unstable shard energy.

## AI
- Moves quickly.
- Attacks in short bursts.
- Retreats briefly after attacking.

## Basic Attack
Shard Claw

## Ability
Shard Blink

Short teleport toward or away from the player.

Cooldown:
6 seconds.

## Required Animations
- Idle
- Run
- Attack
- Dash / Blink
- Death

---

# Waylost Pilgrim

## Role
Support Caster

## Difficulty
Medium

## Description
A lost traveler corrupted by the crossing.

## AI
- Keeps distance.
- Casts shard magic.
- Avoids melee range.

## Basic Attack
Shard Bolt

## Ability
Lost Path

Creates a small rune zone.

Effects:
- slows the player
- slightly pulls the player toward the center

Duration:
4 seconds.

## Required Animations
- Idle
- Walk
- Cast
- Death

---

# Shardheart Oracle

## Role
Biome Boss

## Difficulty
Boss

## Description
The heart of the crossing given form.

Controls paths, signs and unstable shard energy.

## Basic Attack
Shard Beam

Medium-range magic attack.

## Ability 1
Crossroad Sigils

Places several direction sigils on the ground.

After a delay, shard energy strikes those areas.

## Ability 2
Path Reversal

Briefly reverses or disrupts player movement direction.

Use carefully and rarely.

## Ability 3
Summon Shardlings

Summons 2 Shardlings.

## Phase 2
Triggered at 50% HP.

- more sigils appear
- Shard Beam fires faster

## Phase 3
Triggered at 25% HP.

- summons Shardlings more often
- Lost Path zones appear around the arena
- movement disruption becomes more frequent

## Required Animations
- Idle / Hover
- Cast
- Summon
- Roar / Channel
- Death

## VFX
- teal shard energy
- floating signs
- rune zones
- teleport blink
- crystal particles

## SFX
- crystal hum
- teleport
- magic cast
- sign chains
- reality distortion
